content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 8 (C:8):

From the image, atom C:8 is bonded to:
- C:7 (carbon atom) - connected on the left side of the ring
- C:9 (carbon atom) - connected on the right side of the ring  
- H:23 (hydrogen atom) - connected at the bottom

These are the three covalently connected neighbor atoms to C:8.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file information provided in the working directory, I can see the file "geomconf_9155.xyz", which indicates that the geomconf_index for this molecule is **9155**.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 8 (C) are:
- Atom index 7, element C
- Atom index 9, element C  
- Atom index 23, element H

Geomconf_index: 9155

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 8, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
